name: player_adp range year_offset under a year split uses BETWEEN per base-year row
description: With splits=[year] and a range year_offset the correlated AVG subquery uses year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 2 against the offset-expanded adp CTE. Previously emitted invalid SQL referencing an undefined relation.
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2022,2023,2024,2025]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f" as (select "player_adp_index"."pid", "player_adp_index"."season_year", "player_adp_index"."adp", "player_adp_index"."min_pick", "player_adp_index"."max_pick", "player_adp_index"."std_dev", "player_adp_index"."sample_size", "player_adp_index"."percent_drafted" from "player_adp_index" inner join "adp_format" on "player_adp_index"."adp_format_id" = "adp_format"."id" where "player_adp_index"."source_id" in ('SLEEPER') and "player_adp_index"."season_year" in (2023, 2024, 2025) and "adp_format"."scoring_class" in ('PPR') and "adp_format"."num_qb" in (1) and "adp_format"."duration" in ('REDRAFT') and "adp_format"."draft_pool" in ('ALL') and "adp_format"."contest_style" in ('MANAGED') and "player_adp_index"."adp" < 999) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT AVG(t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.adp) FROM t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f WHERE t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.pid = player.pid AND t29bacf22a3fca02de032de64a01f863f.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 2) AS "adp_0", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
